titleStmt.title: SII 8.319: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 319. (A.R. No. 45 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmevivaḷar tiruppoṉmātu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nalamperitu ciṟappa vijaiyamāmakaḷ velpuya
t tiruppa Icaiyum celviyum Eṇṭicai viḷaṅka nirupar vantiṟaiñca niṇilamaṭantaiyait tirumaṇampuṇarntu cirvaḷarta
rum maṇimuṭi kavittena Aṇimuṭi cūṭi mallaiñālattup palluyiṟkellām Ellaiyu ḷiṉpam Iyalviṉi leyta veṇku
ṭai niḻaṟṟac ceṅko locci vāḻi pallūḻi Āḻi naṭappac cempoṉ virasiṅṅāsaṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun
taruḷiya koirājakecaripanmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu Irājarājavaḷanā
ṭṭut tirumuṉaippāṭik kiḻāmurnāṭṭu Ātirājamaṅkalliyapurattu Uṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyāṟkup pūjaikkun tiruppaṭimāṟṟu
kkum tirumuṉaippāṭip peṟukaṉūrnāṭṭu kūṭalūr paññākamuttaraiyaṉ Āḷappiṟantān Araicanārāyaṇaṉāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻak kacciyarā
yaṉen rājarājaṉperuvaḻikku meṟku Eṉ kūṟupaṭiyāṉa Ūrkaḷil Ittevar tevatāṉamāṉa kiḻāmurnāṭṭu kaṇṇamaṅkalamum māṉi
nallūruṅ koṭṭiḷampākkamum toṟuppāṭiyum Āṉāṅkūrnāṭṭuk kāṭṭuppākkamum Ātirājamaṅkalliyapurattu Avaṉikaṟpakaviḷākamum Ivvūṟ tirunāvukkaraiyatevar
tirumaṭappuṟamum Uṭaiyār tirumaṭaiviḷākamum Ivvūrkaḷāl vanta Ippāṭikāvalun taṟiiṟai taṭṭārppāṭṭam kaṭaitteruvukaḷum cekkukkaḷum kamukunantavaṉaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭṭa puṉcai
Uṭpaṭṭa perumpāṭikāvalum maṟṟeppeṟpaṭṭa perumpāṭikāvalum Innāyanāṟkup pūcaikkun tiruppaṭimāṟṟukkuñ cantirātittavaṟ cellakkaṭavatāka viṭṭu panniraṇṭāvatumutal kal veṭṭikkuṭutteṉ
Āḷappiṟantān Araicanārāyaṇaṉāna kulottuṅkacoḻak kacciyarāyaneṉ . Ippaṭi nāṉ ceytate Eṉ tamaiyaṉukkum Eṉ vaṅśattāṟkum Ituve celovutākavuñ ceyten . Ittanma maḻip
tiruvāṇai . puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyā rāṇai . tiruviraiākkali tirukkaṇṇappatevar śrīpātam naṭuvu kottu viṟpiṭittān Ittarma maḻippāṉ vallavaraiyaṉ sattiyam . mātāpi tākkaḷukkup piḻaittār gaṅ
gai Iṭai kumariIṭai
Digital edition of SII 8.319 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
